_meta.description: Rust command line progress reporting library. Uses a template system with progress_chars for bar rendering and tick_chars/tick_strings for spinner animation. No hardcoded predefined themes; users compose their own.

progress_chars_examples.description: The progress_chars method takes a string of 3+ characters: filled, current position, remaining.

common_sets.description: Smooth fractional block fill (8 intermediate chars)

progress_chars_examples.notes: All passed grapheme clusters must be of equal width. More than 3 characters provides intermediate fill states for smoother rendering.

tick_chars_examples.description: Spinner tick characters. The last character is the final/completed state.
tick_chars_examples.notes: At least 2 characters required: one for spinning state, one for final state.

template_keys.wide_bar: Progress bar filling remaining terminal width
